memoryArtifacts.headline: Monumental brass of Nicholas Leveson and Denys (Bodley) Leveson in St Andrew Undershaft, London
memoryArtifacts.description:
The Antiquary vol 45 p141 (1909)
Monumental Brasses in the City of London.
    BY ANDREW OLIVER.
      II. ST. ANDREW UNDERSHAFT.
  (1) 1538.—Nycolas Leveson, wife, eight sons, ten daughters.
  Three shields, two scrolls. Mural, east wall, north aisle.
  He is dressed in a long fur cloak, open at the neck and the end thrown over the arm, showing an under-dress, and a bag or purse worn round the waist.
  The sons also wear cloaks and gowns.
  The wife and daughters are dressed in similar costumes—viz., a kennel head-dress and long flowing gown—and on the wife's figure there is a long rosary attached to a belt worn round the waist.
  From the mouth of the man proceeds a scroll, bearing “Deus miseratur mei,” and from the woman's, “et benedicat nubis.” On the left side of the slab there is a shield for Leveson, a canting coat, Gules, a fess nebule argent, between three leaves slipped or.
  Quartered with Prestwood: Argent, a chevron between three cinque-foils vert.
  On the opposite side there is a shield bearing Bodley, the family arms of the wife:
  Argent, five martlets in saltire sable, on a chief azure three ducal crowns or.
  In the centre of the slab, at the top, a shield bearing Leveson and Prestwood, impaling Bodley. The inscription is as follows:
  “Here under this tombe lyeth buryed the bodyes of Nycolas Leverson Mercer sometime sheryffe of London and Merchant of the Staple at Calys and Denys his wife which Nycolas decessyd ye XX day of August Ano dm Modcxxxix And ye said Denys ye secode day of Dceber Ao Mo vclx whous soull Jhu prdn.”
   Nycolas Leveson was buried, according to the instructions contained in his will, made the 7th day of November, 1536, in the tomb made before the upper pillar of the north side of the church, between the high altar and the altar of the norh aisle.
  His wife died on the 2nd day of December, 1560, and, in accordance with her will, was buried in the Church of St. Andrew Undershaft, in the middle aisle, and at the end of the pew which she had been accustomed to use (see Freemen of London, p. 102).
memoryArtifacts.place: London St Andrew Undershaft with St Mary Axe, Middlesex, England

zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Leveson於1474年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，他的父親Richard Leveson17歲，母親Hilary Willenhall13歲。他於1505年與Dionyse Bodley在英國英格蘭肯特哈林結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1534年被列為high sheriff of essex。他去世於1539年10月15日在英國英格蘭肯特哈林享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 安德魯 武安德沙阿福特 煙雨 聖 瑪麗 阿可。

nameMeanings.name: Leveson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Leveson, Loveson (Old English Lēofsunu).

variants.name: Levison
meanings: English: variant of Leveson, from the Middle English personal name Leveson, Loveson (Old English Lēofsunu, from lēof ‘dear, beloved’ + sunu ‘son’).

variants.name: Lewison
meanings: Welsh and English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name   Lewis   (in Wales this was taken as equivalent to the Welsh personal name   Llewelyn  ). In North America, this surname has reportedly absorbed in some cases the Greek patronymic   Iliopoulos  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): patronymic from the personal name Lewi, Polish-influenced form of Levy .

variants.name: Leverson
meanings: Altered form of Jewish   Levison   or   Levinson  .

variants.name: Lowson
meanings: 1 English, Scottish: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Low, a pet form of Laurence ( see Lawrence ) + -son. Compare Lawson , Larson , and Lorrison .

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Leveson was born in 1474, in London, Middlesex, England, his father, Richard Leveson, was 17 and his mother, Hilary Willenhall, was 13. He married Dionyse Bodley in 1505, in Halling, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. In 1534, at the age of 60, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of essex. He died on 15 October 1539, in Halling, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in St Andrew Undershaft with St Mary Axe, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Leveson est né en 1474, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Richard Leveson, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Hilary Willenhall, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Dionyse Bodley en 1505, à Halling, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. En 1534, à l’âge de 60 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of essex. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1539, à Halling, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à St Andrew Undershaft with St Mary Axe, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Leveson 1474 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Leveson 17 und seine Mutter Hilary Willenhall 13. Er hat 1505 in Halling, Kent, England, United Kingdom Dionyse Bodley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1534, als er 60 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff of essex aufgeführt. Er starb am 15. Oktober 1539 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Halling, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Andrew Undershaft with St Mary Axe, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Leveson è nato il nel 1474 nel London, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Richard Leveson, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Hilary Willenhall, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Dionyse Bodley nel 1505, nel Halling, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1534, all'età di 60 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of essex. Morì il 15 ottobre 1539, nel Halling, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a St Andrew Undershaft with St Mary Axe, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Leveson(이)가 1474년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Leveson(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Hilary Willenhall(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 핼링에서 Dionyse Bodley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1534년, 60세의 나이로 그의 직업은 high sheriff of essex이었다. 그는 1539년 10월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 핼링에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 앤드루 운더샤프트 위스 스트 메리 액에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Leveson nasceu em 1474, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Leveson, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Hilary Willenhall, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Dionyse Bodley em 1505, em Halling, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1534, com 60 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of essex. Ele faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1539, em Halling, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em St Andrew Undershaft with St Mary Axe, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

лондон ст андрю ундиршафт вит ст мэри акс, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Leveson родился в 1474 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Leveson было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Hilary Willenhall, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Dionyse Bodley в 1505 г. в местности холлинг, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1534 году, в возрасте 60 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff of essex. Он умер 15 октября 1539 г. в местности холлинг, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности ст андрю ундиршафт вит ст мэри акс, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Dionyse Bodley en 1505, en Halling, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1534, a la edad de 60 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of essex. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1539, en Halling, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en St Andrew Undershaft with St Mary Axe, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
